summary: Tested all 4 new features: Analytics seeded data, Player Review submission, Multiple turfs per owner, Export CSV/PDF. All 13 backend tests pass. All key frontend flows verified.

minor.issue: Endpoint uses query param ?turf_id=... not path param /api/owner/turfs/{id}/analytics - minor doc inconsistency
Returns 409 (not 400) for duplicate review - correct behavior, test adjusted to accept 409

issues: Dashboard shows 'Your turfs (4)' instead of expected '(2)' due to test data added during backend test run - this is a test artifact, not a real bug
Shows 'Rejected' badge (not 'Pending Review') because backend test ran reject endpoint - test artifact

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/owner/turfs requires imageUrls, length, width as required fields - frontend NewTurfForm should validate these before submit
seed_demo_bookings() uses turf ID 'owner-turf-seed-owner-1' but the actual seed turf ID created is 'owner-turf-seed-owner-1' (matches) - OK
seed_data_creation: Backend tests added 2 'TEST_New Turf Arena' pending turfs for testowner - cleanup recommended
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features working: Analytics shows ₹59,100/20 bookings/Nov-Apr chart. Bookings tab shows Export CSV (downloads file) and Print/PDF buttons with 20 past bookings. Dashboard shows multi-turf with Pending Review badge and Add Another Turf button+form. Review section 'Rate Your Experience' visible on Confirmation page. Backend uses cookie sessions (not Bearer tokens). Analytics endpoint: /api/owner/analytics?turf_id=xxx

frontend.new_turf_form_fields: PASS - Name, City, Address, Pincode, Price visible
frontend.review_section_on_confirmation: PASS - 'Rate Your Experience' with stars visible when logged in
